title: # OmniExtTrackingDef - Metadata API
description:
## Description

Represents a connection between an OmniTrackingGroup in OmniAnalytics and a third-party Analytics system such as Google Analytics.

developerName.description: The unique name of the OmniExtTrackingEventDef in the API.

isActive.description: Specifies whether the OmniExtTrackingDef is active.

masterLabel.description: The unique master label of the OmniExtTrackingEventDef. This internal label doesn't get translated.

omniExtTrackingDefKey.description: A UUID generated internally by Salesforce to uniquely identify an OmniExtTrackingDef record across all orgs.

omniExtTrackingEventDefs.description: The OmniExtTrackingEventDef objects related to this OmniExtTrackingDef.

trackingFrameworkInformation.description: JSON data containing information about an external service, such as the API call and input parameter names.

trackingServiceProvider.description: The third-party Analytics system to which user interaction data is sent. Values are: Google Mixpanel

wsdl_segment:
## WSDL Segment

The following WSDL Segment shows the complete structure of this metadata type:

```xml
<xsd:simpleType name="ExternalTrackingVendor">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Google"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Mixpanel"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:simpleType name="OmniAnalyticsComponentType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Omniscript"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Flexcard"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="OmniExtTrackingDef">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="developerName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isActive" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="omniExtTrackingDefKey" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="omniExtTrackingEventDefs" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:OmniExtTrackingEventDef"/>
        <xsd:element name="trackingFrameworkInformation" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="trackingServiceProvider" type="tns:ExternalTrackingVendor"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="OmniExtTrackingEventDef">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="componentType" type="tns:OmniAnalyticsComponentType"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="developerName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="inclusionRule" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="omniExtTrackingDef" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="omniExtTrackingEventDefKey" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="payloadTemplate" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
